message.content:
@startuml
title $update-core
actor "Integrating application user" as User
participant "Integrating application" as App
participant "<FHIR API> HPI" as FHIR
participant "HPI MDM" as MDM

User -> App: Provide core details to be updated
activate App
App -> FHIR: POST <Endpoint>/Practitioner/$update-core
activate FHIR
FHIR -> FHIR: Validate[]
FHIR -> MDM: Request
activate MDM
MDM --> FHIR
deactivate MDM
FHIR --> App: Return updated Practitioner record
deactivate FHIR
App -> User: Display updated Provider details to user
deactivate App
@enduml
